posts.author: Prabhat_Mohanty
posts.text: Thanks for a new thread on a new SME company. Company is into a specialised field though small in size. It can turn into a good prospect. But what matters most is the management quality and competition. Please throw some light on technical capabilities and peer companies. Is KRN a competitor?

posts.author: Midhunjoe
posts.text: United Heat Transfer United Heat Transfer (UHTL) is a nano cap SME company incorporated in 1995 engaged in manufacturing of wide spectrum of heat exchangers like Shell and Tube heat exchangers (Hx), air cooled heat exchangers, process flow skids, pressure vessels etc. Current Vitals (As on 8th June 2026) CMP : Rs 86 Mkt Cap : Rs 164 cr P/E: 32 ROCE: 12 D/E: .3 The Products listed by the company are as below : image1920×1014 401 KB image1920×1013 427 KB Their manufacturing facility is located in MIDC Ambad, Nashik and new facility is coming up in Talegaon . image1920×1004 377 KB Few things that…
